title: Create: Must Dye
description: This Datapack adds a dye copying recipe using blaze burners and mechanical mixers.
body:
**This Datapack adds a dye copying recipe using blaze burners and mechanical mixers.**

---
**This includes all 16 dyes.**

---

**Optimized for builders, avoids player random tick, and other laggy solutions for dye farms.**

---

- Check the gallery for examples.


**Warning: Install the correct version for fabric or forge, installing the incorrect version will create impossible or cheap recipes.**
